SUMMARY: HUMAN RESOURCES MANAGER with extensive background in administrative duties, including staff development and training, mediation, conflict resolution, benefits and compensation training, HR records management, HR policies development and legal compliance.

JOB TITLE: HR Manager
COMPANY: Company Name City , State

DESCRIPTION: Developed, administered, and coordinated training opportunities for University staff and faculty. Implemented TESOL program, conducted exit interviews, managed performance evaluation system, coordinated awards programs, and maintained orientation schedules.

DESCRIPTION: Trained employees on PeopleSoft Time and Labor module, administered FMLA program, managed HR records. Trained over 250 time keepers, conducted workshops, facilitated Spanish training.
